title: ElevenLabs and Google dominate Artificial Analysis' updated speech-to-text benchmark
summary: ElevenLabs and Google are neck and neck in the race for the best speech recognition. A new benchmark shows who comes out on top. The article ElevenLabs and Google dominate Artificial Analysis' updated speech-to-text benchmark appeared first on The Decoder.

title: AI can link fake online names to real identities in minutes for just a few dollars
summary: Researchers from ETH Zurich and Anthropic demonstrate that pseudonymous internet users can be identified using commercially available AI models for just a few dollars per person. title: Moltbook's alleged AI civilization is just a massive void of bloated bot traffic
summary: Over 2.6 million AI agents interact on Moltbook with zero human involvement. They post, comment, and vote, but a new study shows they never learn from each other. title: The Pentagon-OpenAI-Anthropic fallout comes down to three words: "all lawful use"
summary: After signing a deal with the Department of War, OpenAI tries to build trust by publishing the contract details. So far, it's not working. The article The Pentagon-OpenAI-Anthropic fallout comes down to three words: "all lawful use" appeared first on The Decoder.
